posts.text: “Political leaders seem to be perennial optimists when it comes to the utility of war.” @shashj tells “The Intelligence” how wars have changed—and become more foolish to fight https://www.economist.com/podcasts/2026/05/29/new-world-of-warcraft-how-conflict-has-forever-changed?taid=6a19b486b2348a0001b5c354&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: President Trump says the US Navy is lifting its "blockade" of the Strait of Hormuz and he is meeting in the Situation Room to make a "final determination" on the Iran deal.
